summary: CLI wiring for the backend-killer workload is correct and mirrors the existing workloads verbatim. All five flags are declared with unique envars and defaults, the config struct and literal match, and the launch block and start helper follow the established pattern. go build/vet/gofmt are clean and noisia --help lists all five flags with correct defaults.

verification.envarsUnique: all backend-killer envars unique; pre-existing NOISIA_IDLE_XACTS dup is in wait-xacts (not in new code) and was correctly NOT copied
verification.crossFileConsistency: backendkiller.Config fields (Conninfo, Rate, PlanSize, ShowMemory, ReportInterval) and NewWorkload signature match the helper exactly

acceptanceCriteriaCheck.criterion: Five config struct fields with matching names/types
Launch block under shared --duration ctx, mirrors rollbacks
noisia --help lists all five flags with defaults
